basal_ganglia.fr: Ganglions de la base / noyaux profonds

description.en: Sensorimotor frontal cortex drives the putamen, the motor input nucleus of the basal ganglia.
description.fr: Le cortex frontal sensorimoteur active le putamen, le noyau d'entrée moteur des ganglions de la base.

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.
Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Sensorimotor frontal cortex drives the putamen, the motor input nucleus of the basal ganglia.
description.fr: Le cortex frontal sensorimoteur active le putamen, le noyau d'entrée moteur des ganglions de la base.

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.
Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Prefrontal cortex drives the caudate (associative striatum).
description.fr: Le cortex préfrontal active le noyau caudé (striatum associatif).

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.
Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Prefrontal cortex drives the caudate (associative striatum).
description.fr: Le cortex préfrontal active le noyau caudé (striatum associatif).

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.
Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Posterior parietal association cortex projects to the caudate.
description.fr: Le cortex associatif pariétal postérieur projette vers le noyau caudé.

sources.citation: Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Posterior parietal association cortex projects to the caudate.
description.fr: Le cortex associatif pariétal postérieur projette vers le noyau caudé.

sources.citation: Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Temporal association cortex projects to the striatum.
description.fr: Le cortex associatif temporal projette vers le striatum.

sources.citation: Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Temporal association cortex projects to the striatum.
description.fr: Le cortex associatif temporal projette vers le striatum.

sources.citation: Kemp JM, Powell TPS (1971). The cortico-striate projection in the monkey. Brain 94(3):525-546.

description.en: Cortex excites the subthalamic nucleus directly, the fast 'hyperdirect' brake on movement.
description.fr: Le cortex excite directement le noyau subthalamique, le frein « hyperdirect » rapide du mouvement.

sources.citation: Nambu A, Tokuno H, Takada M (2002). Functional significance of the cortico-subthalamo-pallidal 'hyperdirect' pathway. Neurosci Res 43(2):111-117.

description.en: Cortex excites the subthalamic nucleus directly, the fast 'hyperdirect' brake on movement.
description.fr: Le cortex excite directement le noyau subthalamique, le frein « hyperdirect » rapide du mouvement.

sources.citation: Nambu A, Tokuno H, Takada M (2002). Functional significance of the cortico-subthalamo-pallidal 'hyperdirect' pathway. Neurosci Res 43(2):111-117.

description.en: Direct-pathway striatal neurons inhibit the internal pallidum, releasing (disinhibiting) the thalamus.
description.fr: Les neurones striataux de la voie directe inhibent le pallidum interne, libérant (désinhibant) le thalamus.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Smith Y, Bevan MD, Shink E, Bolam JP (1998). Microcircuitry of the direct and indirect pathways of the basal ganglia. Neuroscience 86(2):353-387.

description.en: Direct-pathway striatal neurons inhibit the internal pallidum, releasing (disinhibiting) the thalamus.
description.fr: Les neurones striataux de la voie directe inhibent le pallidum interne, libérant (désinhibant) le thalamus.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Smith Y, Bevan MD, Shink E, Bolam JP (1998). Microcircuitry of the direct and indirect pathways of the basal ganglia. Neuroscience 86(2):353-387.

description.en: Caudate direct-pathway output to the internal pallidum.
description.fr: Sortie de la voie directe du noyau caudé vers le pallidum interne.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Smith Y, Bevan MD, Shink E, Bolam JP (1998). Microcircuitry of the direct and indirect pathways of the basal ganglia. Neuroscience 86(2):353-387.

description.en: Caudate direct-pathway output to the internal pallidum.
description.fr: Sortie de la voie directe du noyau caudé vers le pallidum interne.

Smith Y, Bevan MD, Shink E, Bolam JP (1998). Microcircuitry of the direct and indirect pathways of the basal ganglia. Neuroscience 86(2):353-387.

description.en: Direct-pathway striatal output to the substantia nigra pars reticulata.
description.fr: Sortie striatale de la voie directe vers la substance noire pars reticulata.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Direct-pathway striatal output to the substantia nigra pars reticulata.
description.fr: Sortie striatale de la voie directe vers la substance noire pars reticulata.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Caudate direct-pathway output to the substantia nigra.
description.fr: Sortie de la voie directe du noyau caudé vers la substance noire.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Caudate direct-pathway output to the substantia nigra.
description.fr: Sortie de la voie directe du noyau caudé vers la substance noire.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: External pallidum inhibits the STN in the indirect pathway.
description.fr: Le pallidum externe inhibe le noyau subthalamique dans la voie indirecte.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: External pallidum inhibits the STN in the indirect pathway.
description.fr: Le pallidum externe inhibe le noyau subthalamique dans la voie indirecte.

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: The STN excites the pallidum, amplifying basal-ganglia output (indirect/hyperdirect pathways).
description.fr: Le noyau subthalamique excite le pallidum, amplifiant la sortie des ganglions de la base (voies indirecte/hyperdirecte).

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: The STN excites the pallidum, amplifying basal-ganglia output (indirect/hyperdirect pathways).
description.fr: Le noyau subthalamique excite le pallidum, amplifiant la sortie des ganglions de la base (voies indirecte/hyperdirecte).

sources.citation: Albin RL, Young AB, Penney JB (1989). The functional anatomy of basal ganglia disorders. Trends Neurosci 12(10):366-375.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Substantia nigra pars compacta dopamine sets the balance between the direct and indirect striatal pathways.
description.fr: La dopamine de la substance noire pars compacta règle l'équilibre entre les voies striatales directe et indirecte.

sources.citation: DeLong MR (1990). Primate models of movement disorders of basal ganglia origin. Trends Neurosci 13(7):281-285.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Substantia nigra pars compacta dopamine sets the balance between the direct and indirect striatal pathways.
description.fr: La dopamine de la substance noire pars compacta règle l'équilibre entre les voies striatales directe et indirecte.

sources.citation: DeLong MR (1990). Primate models of movement disorders of basal ganglia origin. Trends Neurosci 13(7):281-285.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Dopaminergic modulation of the caudate.
description.fr: Modulation dopaminergique du noyau caudé.

sources.citation: DeLong MR (1990). Primate models of movement disorders of basal ganglia origin. Trends Neurosci 13(7):281-285.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Dopaminergic modulation of the caudate.
description.fr: Modulation dopaminergique du noyau caudé.

sources.citation: DeLong MR (1990). Primate models of movement disorders of basal ganglia origin. Trends Neurosci 13(7):281-285.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: The internal pallidum tonically inhibits the motor thalamus, the output gate of the loop.
description.fr: Le pallidum interne inhibe de façon tonique le thalamus moteur, la porte de sortie de la boucle.

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: The internal pallidum tonically inhibits the motor thalamus, the output gate of the loop.
description.fr: Le pallidum interne inhibe de façon tonique le thalamus moteur, la porte de sortie de la boucle.

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.
Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Substantia nigra pars reticulata inhibitory output to the thalamus.
description.fr: Sortie inhibitrice de la substance noire pars reticulata vers le thalamus.

sources.citation: Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Substantia nigra pars reticulata inhibitory output to the thalamus.
description.fr: Sortie inhibitrice de la substance noire pars reticulata vers le thalamus.

sources.citation: Parent A, Hazrati LN (1995). Functional anatomy of the basal ganglia. Brain Res Rev 20(1):91-154.

description.en: Motor thalamus excites frontal cortex, closing the cortico-basal-ganglia-thalamo-cortical loop.
description.fr: Le thalamus moteur excite le cortex frontal, fermant la boucle cortico-ganglions de la base-thalamo-corticale.

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.

description.en: Motor thalamus excites frontal cortex, closing the cortico-basal-ganglia-thalamo-cortical loop.
description.fr: Le thalamus moteur excite le cortex frontal, fermant la boucle cortico-ganglions de la base-thalamo-corticale.

sources.citation: Alexander GE, DeLong MR, Strick PL (1986). Parallel organization of functionally segregated circuits linking basal ganglia and cortex. Annu Rev Neurosci 9:357-381.

description.en: Occipital (visual) cortex reciprocally connects with the thalamus (pulvinar / lateral geniculate).
description.fr: Le cortex occipital (visuel) est réciproquement connecté au thalamus (pulvinar / corps genouillé latéral).

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Occipital (visual) cortex reciprocally connects with the thalamus (pulvinar / lateral geniculate).
description.fr: Le cortex occipital (visuel) est réciproquement connecté au thalamus (pulvinar / corps genouillé latéral).

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Cortex projects to the pontine nuclei (brainstem), the first leg of the cortico-ponto-cerebellar route.
description.fr: Le cortex projette vers les noyaux du pont (tronc cérébral), première étape de la voie cortico-ponto-cérébelleuse.

sources.citation: Middleton FA, Strick PL (2000). Basal ganglia and cerebellar loops: motor and cognitive circuits. Brain Res Rev 31(2-3):236-250.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Cortex projects to the pontine nuclei (brainstem), the first leg of the cortico-ponto-cerebellar route.
description.fr: Le cortex projette vers les noyaux du pont (tronc cérébral), première étape de la voie cortico-ponto-cérébelleuse.

sources.citation: Middleton FA, Strick PL (2000). Basal ganglia and cerebellar loops: motor and cognitive circuits. Brain Res Rev 31(2-3):236-250.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Pontine nuclei send mossy fibers to the cerebellar cortex.
description.fr: Les noyaux du pont envoient des fibres moussues au cortex cérébelleux.

sources.citation: Middleton FA, Strick PL (2000). Basal ganglia and cerebellar loops: motor and cognitive circuits. Brain Res Rev 31(2-3):236-250.

description.en: Deep cerebellar nuclei drive the motor thalamus, feeding the cerebellar loop back to cortex.
description.fr: Les noyaux cérébelleux profonds activent le thalamus moteur, renvoyant la boucle cérébelleuse vers le cortex.

sources.citation: Middleton FA, Strick PL (2000). Basal ganglia and cerebellar loops: motor and cognitive circuits. Brain Res Rev 31(2-3):236-250.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Deep cerebellar nuclei drive the motor thalamus, feeding the cerebellar loop back to cortex.
description.fr: Les noyaux cérébelleux profonds activent le thalamus moteur, renvoyant la boucle cérébelleuse vers le cortex.

sources.citation: Middleton FA, Strick PL (2000). Basal ganglia and cerebellar loops: motor and cognitive circuits. Brain Res Rev 31(2-3):236-250.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Entorhinal (medial temporal) cortex drives the hippocampus via the perforant path.
description.fr: Le cortex entorhinal (temporal médial) active l'hippocampe via la voie perforante.

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Entorhinal (medial temporal) cortex drives the hippocampus via the perforant path.
description.fr: Le cortex entorhinal (temporal médial) active l'hippocampe via la voie perforante.

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The major hippocampal output gathers into the fornix, the great arching tract of the Papez circuit.
description.fr: La principale sortie hippocampique se rassemble dans le fornix, le grand faisceau arqué du circuit de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The major hippocampal output gathers into the fornix, the great arching tract of the Papez circuit.
description.fr: La principale sortie hippocampique se rassemble dans le fornix, le grand faisceau arqué du circuit de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The fornix carries hippocampal output forward to the mammillary bodies (Papez circuit).
description.fr: Le fornix transporte la sortie hippocampique vers les corps mammillaires (circuit de Papez).

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The fornix carries hippocampal output forward to the mammillary bodies (Papez circuit).
description.fr: Le fornix transporte la sortie hippocampique vers les corps mammillaires (circuit de Papez).

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Mammillary bodies project to the anterior thalamic nuclei, continuing the Papez circuit.
description.fr: Les corps mammillaires projettent vers les noyaux thalamiques antérieurs, poursuivant le circuit de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.

description.en: Mammillary bodies project to the anterior thalamic nuclei, continuing the Papez circuit.
description.fr: Les corps mammillaires projettent vers les noyaux thalamiques antérieurs, poursuivant le circuit de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.

description.en: The anterior thalamic nuclei project to the cingulate gyrus, the next leg of the Papez circuit.
description.fr: Les noyaux thalamiques antérieurs projettent vers le gyrus cingulaire, étape suivante du circuit de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.

description.en: The anterior thalamic nuclei project to the cingulate gyrus, the next leg of the Papez circuit.
description.fr: Les noyaux thalamiques antérieurs projettent vers le gyrus cingulaire, étape suivante du circuit de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.

description.en: The cingulate gyrus projects back to the hippocampus via the cingulum, closing the Papez loop.
description.fr: Le gyrus cingulaire reprojette vers l'hippocampe via le cingulum, fermant la boucle de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The cingulate gyrus projects back to the hippocampus via the cingulum, closing the Papez loop.
description.fr: Le gyrus cingulaire reprojette vers l'hippocampe via le cingulum, fermant la boucle de Papez.

sources.citation: Papez JW (1937). A proposed mechanism of emotion. Arch Neurol Psychiatry 38(4):725-743.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Mitral cells of the olfactory bulb project to the corticomedial amygdala.
description.fr: Les cellules mitrales du bulbe olfactif projettent vers l'amygdale corticomédiale.

sources.citation: Price JL (1990). Olfactory system. In: Paxinos G (ed), The Human Nervous System. Academic Press, pp. 979-1001.

description.en: Mitral cells of the olfactory bulb project to the corticomedial amygdala.
description.fr: Les cellules mitrales du bulbe olfactif projettent vers l'amygdale corticomédiale.

sources.citation: Price JL (1990). Olfactory system. In: Paxinos G (ed), The Human Nervous System. Academic Press, pp. 979-1001.

description.en: Bulbar output reaches the piriform / insular olfactory cortex.
description.fr: La sortie bulbaire atteint le cortex olfactif piriforme / insulaire.

sources.citation: Price JL (1990). Olfactory system. In: Paxinos G (ed), The Human Nervous System. Academic Press, pp. 979-1001.

description.en: Bulbar output reaches the piriform / insular olfactory cortex.
description.fr: La sortie bulbaire atteint le cortex olfactif piriforme / insulaire.

sources.citation: Price JL (1990). Olfactory system. In: Paxinos G (ed), The Human Nervous System. Academic Press, pp. 979-1001.

description.en: The amygdala projects to the hypothalamus via the stria terminalis, driving autonomic / endocrine responses.
description.fr: L'amygdale projette vers l'hypothalamus via la strie terminale, déclenchant des réponses autonomes / endocrines.

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The amygdala projects to the hypothalamus via the stria terminalis, driving autonomic / endocrine responses.
description.fr: L'amygdale projette vers l'hypothalamus via la strie terminale, déclenchant des réponses autonomes / endocrines.

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Hippocampal fibers run in the precommissural fornix to the septal nuclei.
description.fr: Les fibres hippocampiques cheminent dans le fornix précommissural vers les noyaux septaux.

sources.citation: Dutar P, Bassant MH, Senut MC, Lamour Y (1995). The septohippocampal pathway: structure and function. Physiol Rev 75(2):393-427.

description.en: Hippocampal fibers run in the precommissural fornix to the septal nuclei.
description.fr: Les fibres hippocampiques cheminent dans le fornix précommissural vers les noyaux septaux.

sources.citation: Dutar P, Bassant MH, Senut MC, Lamour Y (1995). The septohippocampal pathway: structure and function. Physiol Rev 75(2):393-427.

description.en: Medial septal cholinergic neurons project to the hippocampus, pacing the hippocampal theta rhythm.
description.fr: Les neurones cholinergiques du septum médial projettent vers l'hippocampe, cadençant le rythme thêta hippocampique.

sources.citation: Dutar P, Bassant MH, Senut MC, Lamour Y (1995). The septohippocampal pathway: structure and function. Physiol Rev 75(2):393-427.

description.en: Medial septal cholinergic neurons project to the hippocampus, pacing the hippocampal theta rhythm.
description.fr: Les neurones cholinergiques du septum médial projettent vers l'hippocampe, cadençant le rythme thêta hippocampique.

sources.citation: Dutar P, Bassant MH, Senut MC, Lamour Y (1995). The septohippocampal pathway: structure and function. Physiol Rev 75(2):393-427.

description.en: Midbrain dopaminergic neurons (VTA / substantia nigra) project to the nucleus accumbens, the reward hub.
description.fr: Les neurones dopaminergiques du mésencéphale (ATV / substance noire) projettent vers le noyau accumbens, le centre de la récompense.

sources.citation: Haber SN, Knutson B (2010). The reward circuit: linking primate anatomy and human imaging. Neuropsychopharmacology 35(1):4-26.

description.en: Midbrain dopaminergic neurons (VTA / substantia nigra) project to the nucleus accumbens, the reward hub.
description.fr: Les neurones dopaminergiques du mésencéphale (ATV / substance noire) projettent vers le noyau accumbens, le centre de la récompense.

sources.citation: Haber SN, Knutson B (2010). The reward circuit: linking primate anatomy and human imaging. Neuropsychopharmacology 35(1):4-26.

description.en: Nucleus accumbens medium spiny neurons project to the (ventral) pallidum, the ventral-striatal output.
description.fr: Les neurones épineux moyens du noyau accumbens projettent vers le pallidum (ventral), la sortie du striatum ventral.

sources.citation: Haber SN, Knutson B (2010). The reward circuit: linking primate anatomy and human imaging. Neuropsychopharmacology 35(1):4-26.

description.en: Nucleus accumbens medium spiny neurons project to the (ventral) pallidum, the ventral-striatal output.
description.fr: Les neurones épineux moyens du noyau accumbens projettent vers le pallidum (ventral), la sortie du striatum ventral.

sources.citation: Haber SN, Knutson B (2010). The reward circuit: linking primate anatomy and human imaging. Neuropsychopharmacology 35(1):4-26.

description.en: Hypothalamic neurons drive the pituitary via the median eminence / portal system and the posterior hypophyseal tract.
description.fr: Les neurones hypothalamiques commandent l'hypophyse via l'éminence médiane / le système porte et le tractus hypophysaire postérieur.

sources.citation: Swanson LW, Sawchenko PE (1983). Hypothalamic integration: organization of the paraventricular and supraoptic nuclei. Annu Rev Neurosci 6:269-324.

description.en: Hypothalamic neurons drive the pituitary via the median eminence / portal system and the posterior hypophyseal tract.
description.fr: Les neurones hypothalamiques commandent l'hypophyse via l'éminence médiane / le système porte et le tractus hypophysaire postérieur.

sources.citation: Swanson LW, Sawchenko PE (1983). Hypothalamic integration: organization of the paraventricular and supraoptic nuclei. Annu Rev Neurosci 6:269-324.

description.en: Homotopic callosal fibers linking the two frontal lobes.
description.fr: Fibres calleuses homotopiques reliant les deux lobes frontaux.

sources.citation: Aboitiz F, Scheibel AB, Fisher RS, Zaidel E (1992). Fiber composition of the human corpus callosum. Brain Res 598(1-2):143-153.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Homotopic callosal fibers linking the two parietal lobes.
description.fr: Fibres calleuses homotopiques reliant les deux lobes pariétaux.

sources.citation: Aboitiz F, Scheibel AB, Fisher RS, Zaidel E (1992). Fiber composition of the human corpus callosum. Brain Res 598(1-2):143-153.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Splenial callosal fibers linking the two occipital lobes.
description.fr: Fibres calleuses spléniales reliant les deux lobes occipitaux.

sources.citation: Aboitiz F, Scheibel AB, Fisher RS, Zaidel E (1992). Fiber composition of the human corpus callosum. Brain Res 598(1-2):143-153.
Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Older commissure linking the temporal lobes (and olfactory structures).
description.fr: Commissure plus ancienne reliant les lobes temporaux (et les structures olfactives).

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: Reciprocal claustro-cortical link with prefrontal cortex (implicated in salience / attention).
description.fr: Lien claustro-cortical réciproque avec le cortex préfrontal (impliqué dans la saillance / l'attention).

sources.citation: Crick FC, Koch C (2005). What is the function of the claustrum? Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci 360(1458):1271-1279.

description.en: Reciprocal claustro-cortical link with prefrontal cortex (implicated in salience / attention).
description.fr: Lien claustro-cortical réciproque avec le cortex préfrontal (impliqué dans la saillance / l'attention).

sources.citation: Crick FC, Koch C (2005). What is the function of the claustrum? Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci 360(1458):1271-1279.

description.en: The claustrum tightly interconnects with the adjacent insular cortex.
description.fr: Le claustrum est étroitement interconnecté avec le cortex insulaire adjacent.

sources.citation: Crick FC, Koch C (2005). What is the function of the claustrum? Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci 360(1458):1271-1279.

description.en: The claustrum tightly interconnects with the adjacent insular cortex.
description.fr: Le claustrum est étroitement interconnecté avec le cortex insulaire adjacent.

sources.citation: Crick FC, Koch C (2005). What is the function of the claustrum? Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci 360(1458):1271-1279.

description.en: The anterior insula and the cingulate co-activate as the salience network.
description.fr: L'insula antérieure et le cortex cingulaire s'activent ensemble comme réseau de saillance.

sources.citation: Menon V, Uddin LQ (2010). Saliency, switching, attention and control: a network model of insula function. Brain Struct Funct 214(5-6):655-667.

description.en: The anterior insula and the cingulate co-activate as the salience network.
description.fr: L'insula antérieure et le cortex cingulaire s'activent ensemble comme réseau de saillance.

sources.citation: Menon V, Uddin LQ (2010). Saliency, switching, attention and control: a network model of insula function. Brain Struct Funct 214(5-6):655-667.

description.en: Basolateral amygdala glutamatergic input to the ventral striatum (motivational salience).
description.fr: Entrée glutamatergique de l'amygdale basolatérale vers le striatum ventral (saillance motivationnelle).

sources.citation: Haber SN, Knutson B (2010). The reward circuit: linking primate anatomy and human imaging. Neuropsychopharmacology 35(1):4-26.

description.en: Basolateral amygdala glutamatergic input to the ventral striatum (motivational salience).
description.fr: Entrée glutamatergique de l'amygdale basolatérale vers le striatum ventral (saillance motivationnelle).

sources.citation: Haber SN, Knutson B (2010). The reward circuit: linking primate anatomy and human imaging. Neuropsychopharmacology 35(1):4-26.

description.en: The mammillary bodies sit within and connect to the posterior hypothalamus.
description.fr: Les corps mammillaires se situent dans l'hypothalamus postérieur et s'y connectent.

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The mammillary bodies sit within and connect to the posterior hypothalamus.
description.fr: Les corps mammillaires se situent dans l'hypothalamus postérieur et s'y connectent.

sources.citation: Schmahmann JD, Pandya DN (2006). Fiber Pathways of the Brain. Oxford University Press.

description.en: The septal nuclei project to the hypothalamus, a limbic-autonomic relay.
description.fr: Les noyaux septaux projettent vers l'hypothalamus, un relais limbique-autonome.

sources.citation: Swanson LW, Sawchenko PE (1983). Hypothalamic integration: organization of the paraventricular and supraoptic nuclei. Annu Rev Neurosci 6:269-324.

description.en: The septal nuclei project to the hypothalamus, a limbic-autonomic relay.
description.fr: Les noyaux septaux projettent vers l'hypothalamus, un relais limbique-autonome.

sources.citation: Swanson LW, Sawchenko PE (1983). Hypothalamic integration: organization of the paraventricular and supraoptic nuclei. Annu Rev Neurosci 6:269-324.
